title: C418 Music Only + Creative Music In Survival
description: A resource pack that only allows music from C418 to play, also now allows 10 songs from the Volume Beta soundtrack to play in Survival.
body:
Based on Redsquare's "C418 Songs Only", this pack removes any music that isn't by C418, but now also adds various tracks from Creative Mode and Volume Beta into Survival Mode where they couldn't be heard before.

Why? Because I love C418's music, especially the Volume Beta stuff.

The following songs are configured to play in the Overworld in Survival Mode:

**Creative Mode Exclusives**

-   Blind Spots
-   Biome Fest
-   Haunt Muskie
-   Aria Math
-   Taswell
-   Dreiton

**Main Menu Exclusives**

-   Moog City 2
-   Mutation
-   Floating Trees
-   Beginning 2

If you wish to support this pack, please redirect to Redsquare's original page: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/c418-songs-only

He deserves the credit, not me.

NOTE: If the pack is displayed as unsupported, but you have the correct version, you are most likely in an older version of Minecraft. You can safely dismiss the message. It is just a visual bug.

**Credits:**

- C418
- Resquare

**LEGAL:** None of Rosenfeld's / C418's songs are included in any of these downloads. No files are being added. Rather the sounds.json file is being tinkered to change what songs can and can't play. [RESPECTING OF https://c418.org/2017/01/26/what-am-i-allowed-to-do-with-daniels-music/]
